name: natural-payments
description: Send payments, check balances, and manage financial workflows through Natural's agentic payments platform. Supports delegation, compliance, and full observability.
author: icerven

tools.name: natural_list_customers
tools.description: List all customers who have delegated payment authority to your agents via Natural

tools.name: natural_check_balance
tools.description: Check the wallet balance for a delegated customer on Natural

customer_party_id.description: The party ID of the customer (pty_...)

tools.name: natural_send_payment
tools.description: Send a payment to a recipient on behalf of a delegated customer via Natural

recipient.description: Recipient email, phone, or party ID

customer_party_id.description: The customer party ID making the payment (pty_...)

tools.name: natural_get_payment
tools.description: Get the status and details of a specific payment on Natural

payment_id.description: The payment ID to look up (pay_...)

tools.name: natural_list_transactions
tools.description: List recent transactions for a customer on Natural

customer_party_id.description: The party ID of the customer (pty_...)
